derivation_notes.key_format: kind(8 bytes LE) || created_at(8 bytes LE)
derivation_notes.levid_location: VALUE field (8-byte LE uint64) of each index entry
derivation_notes.sort_semantics: Both kind and created_at compared NUMERICALLY (golpe LE uint64). Not memcmp — both bytes would invert at the same boundary.

adversarial_demonstrations.name: created_at inversion
adversarial_demonstrations.pair: levIds [5,6] at ts=1700000255 vs levIds [7,8] at ts=1700000256 (same kind=1)

adversarial_demonstrations.name: kind inversion (kind=255 vs kind=256)
adversarial_demonstrations.pair: levId=3 (kind=255) and levId=2 (kind=256) at same ts=1700000000
adversarial_demonstrations.memcmp_wrong_order: kind256 (0001...) < kind255 (ff00...) under memcmp at byte 0 — INVERTED
adversarial_demonstrations.golpe_correct_order: kind=255 < kind=256 numerically — levId=3 before levId=2

derivation_notes.tie_resolution: Events with same (kind, created_at) key are sorted by levId ascending (MDB_DUPSORT + MDB_INTEGERDUP)
